Name: Chicken & Brown Rice Bowl
Ingredients: Chicken Breast: 174g | Brown Rice Cooked: 195g | Broccoli Raw: 91g | Olive Oil: 14g
Steps: Season chicken with salt and pepper.;Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.;Cook chicken 6 min each side until cooked through, then slice.;Steam broccoli 3 min.;Serve over brown rice.

Name: Oat & Banana Breakfast
Ingredients: Rolled Oats: 90g | Banana: 118g | Whole Milk: 120g | Almonds: 14g
Steps: Bring milk to a simmer in a small pot.;Add oats and cook 5 min stirring occasionally.;Top with sliced banana and crushed almonds.;Serve warm.

Name: Spinach Omelette
Ingredients: Eggs: 100g | Spinach Raw: 60g | Cheddar Cheese: 28g | Olive Oil: 7g | Cottage Cheese: 50g
Steps: Whisk eggs with a pinch of salt.;Heat olive oil in a non-stick pan.;Add spinach and wilt 1 min.;Pour eggs over spinach.;Add cottage cheese and cheddar, fold and cook until set.

Name: Avocado Toast
Steps: Toast the bread until golden.;Mash avocado with a pinch of salt and lemon juice.;Spread avocado over toast and serve.

Name: Salmon & Rice Bowl
Ingredients: Salmon Fillet: 170g | White Rice Cooked: 186g | Broccoli Raw: 91g
Steps: Season salmon with salt and pepper.;Pan-fry salmon 4 min each side until cooked through.;Steam broccoli 3 min.;Serve salmon and broccoli over rice.

Name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
Steps: Layer yogurt in a glass.;Slice banana and place on top.;Sprinkle crushed almonds and serve immediately.

Name: Lentil Soup
Ingredients: Lentils Cooked: 396g | Spinach Raw: 60g | Olive Oil: 14g
Steps: Heat olive oil in a large pot.;Add lentils and 600ml water, bring to a boil.;Reduce heat and simmer 15 min.;Stir in spinach and cook 2 more min.;Season and serve.

Name: Sweet Potato & Lentil Curry
Ingredients: Sweet Potato: 260g | Lentils Cooked: 198g | Whole Milk: 100g | Olive Oil: 14g
Steps: Heat olive oil and add diced sweet potato, cook 5 min.;Add lentils and 200ml water, simmer 15 min until sweet potato is tender.;Stir in milk and season with salt and cumin.;Simmer 5 more min and serve.

Name: Broccoli Cheddar Bake
Ingredients: Broccoli Raw: 400g | Cheddar Cheese: 113g | Whole Milk: 240g | Olive Oil: 14g
Steps: Preheat oven to 200°C.;Steam broccoli 4 min and place in a baking dish.;Heat milk with olive oil, stir in grated cheddar until melted.;Pour sauce over broccoli.;Bake 20 min until golden and bubbling.

Name: Overnight Oats
Ingredients: Rolled Oats: 80g | Whole Milk: 180g | Greek Yogurt: 60g | Almond Butter: 16g | Banana: 60g
Steps: Combine oats, milk, yogurt and almond butter in a jar.;Stir well to combine.;Seal and refrigerate overnight (at least 6 hours).;Top with sliced banana before serving.
